title: Stage 1: National Qualifier Test (NQT)
desc: Integrated assessment evaluating numerical ability, logical reasoning, verbal skills, and hands-on coding.
tip: Focus on speed and accuracy. Practice standard foundation programming.

title: Stage 2: Technical Interview
desc: Face-to-face loop covering final-year projects, programming basics (C++/Java/Python), OOP, DBMS, and simple coding.
tip: Prepare core CS subjects like Operating Systems, DBMS concepts, and normalization.

title: Stage 3: Managerial & HR Interview
desc: Evaluates logical thinking, communication skills, career aspirations, and adaptability to company culture.
tip: Keep a positive attitude and demonstrate willingness to learn new technologies.
